---
title: "SuppFig2B_Stromal_UMAP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```
```{r}
# Path to integrated Seurat object
lungQuery <- readRDS("path_to_object/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```
```{r}
stromal_celltypes <- c(
  "Adventitial fibroblasts",
  "Alveolar fibroblasts",
  "Myofibroblasts",
  "Pericytes",
  "Smooth muscle"
)

stromal <- subset(
  lungQuery,
  subset = predicted.ann_finest_level %in% stromal_celltypes
)

p_stromal_umap <- DimPlot(
  stromal,
  group.by = "predicted.ann_finest_level",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.01,
  label.size = 4,
  raster = FALSE
) +
  ggtitle("Stromal Cell Subclusters")

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots_UMAP/Stromal_Lineage_UMAP.png",
  plot = p_stromal_umap,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300,
  limitsize = FALSE
)

print(p_stromal_umap)

knitr::include_graphics("Plots_UMAP/Stromal_Lineage_UMAP.png")
```
